Class BaitZone

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.services.bait.BaitZone
public class BaitZone extends Object
Represents an active bait zone in the world.

Zones are created when a bait item lands in water and persist until their duration expires. Any fishing hook that lands within the zone's radius receives the configured bonuses.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaitZone

      public BaitZone(org.bukkit.Location centre, BaitConfig config, Instant expiry, org.bukkit.entity.TextDisplay display)
      Constructs a new BaitZone.
      Parameters:
      centre - the centre of the zone at water surface level
      config - the bait configuration driving this zone
      expiry - the instant this zone expires
      display - the text display entity above the centre

  • Method Details

    • centre

      public org.bukkit.Location centre()

    • config

      public BaitConfig config()

    • isExpired

      public boolean isExpired()
      Returns true if this zone has passed its expiry time.
      Returns:
      true if expired

    • secondsRemaining

      public long secondsRemaining()
      Returns the number of seconds remaining before this zone expires.
      Returns:
      seconds remaining, clamped to zero

    • contains

      public boolean contains(org.bukkit.Location location)
      Returns true if the given location falls within this zone's radius. Uses a flat 2D distance check — Y coordinate is ignored.
      Parameters:
      location - the location to test
      Returns:
      true if inside the zone

    • updateLabel

      public void updateLabel(net.kyori.adventure.text.Component text)
      Updates the text shown on the floating display entity.
      Parameters:
      text - the new display text

    • removeDisplay

      public void removeDisplay()
      Removes the text display entity from the world if it is still alive.
